message:
fix: auto-clear stale pinned flag on status transition

When a bead transitions from status=pinned to status=hooked (via gt hook),
the legacy pinned=1 boolean column was not cleared. bd list excludes
pinned=1 rows by default, making hooked beads invisible to gt hook status.

Two fixes:
- bd list: skip pinned exclusion when --status=hooked
- UpdateIssue: auto-clear pinned=1 when status transitions away from pinned

This caused recurring "nothing on hook" failures for bd-pr-sheriff and
gt-pr-sheriff standing orders.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
